content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
April
27,
1992
William P.
Conway, Jr.
1116 24th Street
Sacramento,
CA 95816
Re:
Your Request for Advice
Our File No.
A-92-217
Dear Mr.
Conway:
You have requested advice on behalf of the California
Mortuary Alliance and the Interment Association of California
concerning the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act
(the “Act”) .1/
This letter is to advise you that the name “California
Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee” does comply
with the name identification requirements for a sponsored
committee under the Act.
(Section 84102.)
Please feel free to call me at
(916)
322-5662,
Monday through
Thursday between 8:00 a.m.
and 5:00 p.m., if you have any
additional questions regarding this matter.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
By:
Alice Hughes
Political Reform Consultant
¶1/
Government Code Sections 81000-91015.
All tattoy
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at
2 California Code of Regulations
Section 18000,
et q.
All references to regulations are to Title
2,
Division
6 of the Californi3
Code of Regulations.

sections.conclusion: This letter is to advise you that the name "California Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee" does comply with the name identification requirements for a sponsored committee under the Act. (Section 84102.)
sections.question_synthetic: Does the name 'California Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee' comply with the name identification requirements for a sponsored committee under the Political Reform Act?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC advises that the proposed committee name 'California Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee' complies with the name identification requirements for a sponsored committee under Government Code Section 84102.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document lacks formal QUESTION and CONCLUSION section headers but contains clear question and advice within body text. Question inferred from context of request. No explicit 'QUESTION' or 'CONCLUSION' section headers present.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Does the name 'California Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee' comply with the name identification requirements for a sponsored committee under the Political Reform Act?

CONCLUSION: This letter is to advise you that the name "California Interment and Mortuary Political Action Committee" does comply with the name identification requirements for a sponsored committee under the Act. (Section 84102.)

(Section 84102.) Please feel free to call me at (916) 322-5662, Monday through Thursday between 8:00 a.m. and 5:00 p.m., if you have any additional questions regarding this matter.
